brief: Trump's unsubstantiated election fraud claims and US-Iran military escalation dominate headlines, while new research explores the interplay of writing and drawing in children's compositions and the bias of AI detection tools against autistic writers.
news_summary: President Trump delivered a primetime speech alleging Chinese interference in the 2020 election without new evidence, as US-Iran strikes intensify and Texas flooding leaves at least two dead. Andy Burnham becomes leader of the UK Labour Party.
papers_summary: Studies examine children's multimodal writing combining drawing and text, the impact of ChatGPT revision on personal statements, and the misclassification of autistic writing as AI-generated, alongside benchmarks for multimodal LLMs in scientific visualization.

en.brief: Trump's unsubstantiated election fraud claims and US-Iran military escalation dominate headlines, while new research explores the interplay of writing and drawing in children's compositions and the bias of AI detection tools against autistic writers.
en.news_summary: President Trump delivered a primetime speech alleging Chinese interference in the 2020 election without new evidence, as US-Iran strikes intensify and Texas flooding leaves at least two dead. Andy Burnham becomes leader of the UK Labour Party.
en.papers_summary: Studies examine children's multimodal writing combining drawing and text, the impact of ChatGPT revision on personal statements, and the misclassification of autistic writing as AI-generated, alongside benchmarks for multimodal LLMs in scientific visualization.

zh.brief: 今日重點：香港禁書清單持續擴大，英國新首相貝安德成謎，習近平首現AI大會強調開源，依托咪酯毒品在東亞蔓延，特朗普再提選舉舞弊指控。
zh.news_summary: 港區國安法後書籍頻遭下架；英國新首相貝安德背景神秘；LV訴茉莉奶白案引發輿論審判；習近平出席世界AI大會，力推開源戰略；依托咪酯電子煙毒品在青少年中擴散；特朗普收緊學生簽證、指控中國干預選舉。

todays_image.caption: The tanker's camouflage hides its true intentions, much like unproven claims of foreign interference obscure underlying concerns about election integrity.
todays_image.title: Starboard Side and Details of 5075 Tanker, Showing Camouflage
